name: Basic Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze juice from the lemons into a bowl. Set aside the lemon rinds.
2. Strain the lemon juice into a large pitcher.
3. Add sugar and ice water to the pitcher; stir until the sugar is dissolved.
4. Set aside the mixture.
5. Place the lemon rinds in a bowl and add boiling water. Let stand until the water is cold.
6. Discard the lemon rinds.
7. Add the remaining water to the pitcher and stir well.
8. Refrigerate until well chilled.
